title: HUDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: HUDCO is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!
